title: Pampoenmoes
excerpt: Ingredients 1 butternut squash 10 slices of bread 250 ml butter 125 ml fine cinnamon sugar salt and pepper Method Peel and cut the butternut squash into thick slices. Spread the bread thickly with butter and cut into triangles. Layer a layer of butternut, a layer of bread, and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Salt and pepper between the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 butternut squash
  • 10 slices of bread
  • 250 ml butter
  • 125 ml fine cinnamon sugar
  • salt and pepper

Method

Peel and cut the butternut squash into thick slices.

Spread the bread thickly with butter and cut into triangles.

Layer a layer of butternut, a layer of bread, and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar. Salt and pepper between the layers.

Repeat the layers and finish with a layer of butternut.

Drizzle butter over the top layer of cinnamon bread.

Bake covered with foil in the oven for 1 hour at 180 degrees Celsius.

Remove the foil and bake for another 5 minutes.

Easy!
